title: HIT: The Third Case
desc: The Homicide Intervention Team dispatches relentless officer Arjun Sarkar to track down a band of murderers and put an end to their gruesome killing spree.

title: Radhakrishna
desc: When the forest department takes away the elephant, the child is left without his dearest friend. The young boy undertakes a journey to find the lost animal.

title: Janatha Garage
desc: When Anand visits Hyderabad, he encounters Sathyam, who operates an organisation aiding the underprivileged. Sathyam, swayed by Anand's vision, hands over the organisation's management to him.

title: Garudan
desc: The loyal shadow of two childhood friends, Sokkan, grapples with allegiance and betrayal after a temple's riches comes between all of them.

title: Pokkiri Raja
desc: Raja takes the blame for a murder committed by his father and is deserted by him. Years later, his father comes seeking his help when his younger brother, Surya, is falsely imprisoned.
